name: Video Background Remove
description: Remove a person from a video background and composite onto a solid color, an image, or transparency. Powered by RVM (Robust Video Matting) MobileNetV3 via onnxruntime, falling back gracefully when the model or runtime is missing.

description_i18n.zh: 用 RVM (Robust Video Matting) MobileNetV3 抠出人物，再合成到纯色 / 图片 / 透明背景。onnxruntime 或模型缺失时给出引导而不是崩溃。
description_i18n.en: Remove a person from a video background and composite onto a solid color, an image, or transparency. Powered by RVM (Robust Video Matting) MobileNetV3 via onnxruntime, falling back gracefully when the model or runtime is missing.

author: OpenAkita
